qa_pairs.question: Why do Alliance accounts need to be renewed annually?
qa_pairs.answer: Annual renewal collects up-to-date information required by granting agencies and deactivates accounts that are no longer in use.

qa_pairs.question: Who is required to renew their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: All Alliance users must renew their account between May 6 and June 9, 2026, or it will be automatically deactivated.

qa_pairs.question: Do I need to renew my Alliance account if I created it after January 1?
qa_pairs.answer: No, if you created your account after January 1, you do not have to renew it at this time, but you still need to accept new policies and consents on CCDB.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I review the Privacy Policy and other agreements I've accepted?
qa_pairs.answer: All agreements you've accepted are visible on the CCDB's Agreements page (https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/agreements/user_index), and policies are available on the Alliance website (https://alliancecan.ca/en/policies).

qa_pairs.question: What is a primary role and why is it important?
qa_pairs.answer: Your primary role is your main position, generally the one you will hold for the longest, such as a faculty appointment or your primary supervisor's role. It helps manage accounts with multiple roles, facilitates communication, and aids with reporting, and non-renewal will deactivate your account.

qa_pairs.question: Can I change my primary role in Alliance?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, users with multiple active roles can change their primary role at any time on CCDB's 'Home' page by clicking the 'Make this role primary' checkbox next to their chosen role.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if my situation, such as my faculty position or academic level, has changed?
qa_pairs.answer: You must apply for a new role via CCDB by going to 'My Account' → 'Apply for a new role'. If you no longer need current roles, you can disable them.

qa_pairs.question: My Alliance account has expired and been deactivated, but I still need access to my data. What should I do?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to support@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance with accessing your data.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I can't find the answer to my account renewal question in the FAQ?
qa_pairs.answer: You should send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance with your request.

qa_pairs.question: What are the consequences if a faculty member (PI) does not renew their Alliance account by the deadline?
qa_pairs.answer: If a faculty member's account is not renewed, their account and all accounts of their sponsored users will be deactivated, pausing jobs and blocking access to files until the sponsor's account is reactivated.

qa_pairs.question: How do faculty members (PIs) renew their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members receive an email with a link to the CCDB renewal form, where they must update contact information, Field of Research, complete a User Satisfaction Survey, update the status of sponsored roles, and then click 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL'.

qa_pairs.question: If I am a PI moving to a new institution, will my sponsored users automatically transfer to my new role?
qa_pairs.answer: No, sponsored users will have to apply for new roles sponsored by your new faculty position. You may also need to add them to your Resource Allocation Project (RAP) if you have one.

qa_pairs.question: If I indicated that a sponsored user has moved on, can I still access their files?
qa_pairs.answer: Consent from that user may be required to access their files. It's important to make arrangements with the sponsored user as soon as possible.

qa_pairs.question: How do users with sponsored roles (e.g., Doctoral, Masters) renew their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: They receive an email with a link to the CCDB renewal form, where they must update contact information, complete the form, fill out a User Satisfaction Survey, and then click 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL'.

qa_pairs.question: My sponsored role is still deactivated even after I completed the renewal on CCDB. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: Your role remains deactivated because your sponsor has not yet renewed or reactivated their own account. It will be activated once your sponsor renews their account and confirms your role.

qa_pairs.question: What if I renewed my Alliance account with the wrong role by mistake?
qa_pairs.answer: You should create a new role with your current information via CCDB's 'My Account' → 'Apply for a new role'. Your old, incorrectly renewed role will automatically expire.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I'm trying to reactivate an old sponsored role but my sponsor cannot confirm it?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance with your request.
